page.cancelledWarning: Payment was cancelled. Your form data has been preserved. You can try again when ready.
page.paymentSuccessDesc: Your order has been submitted and is pending staff approval. You'll receive an email confirmation shortly.
page.processingWait: Please wait while we confirm your payment
page.failedToLoad: Failed to load event information. Please try again.
page.invalidFormData: Invalid form data structure. Expected { usuarios: [...] }
page.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields for each ticket
page.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

success.title: Payment Authorized!
success.description: Your payment has been successfully authorized and is being held securely.
success.pendingDescription: Your order is now waiting for staff confirmation. Once approved, your payment will be processed and you'll receive your tickets via email.
success.referenceHint: Save this reference number. You can use it to track your order status or contact support.

infoList.authorized: Your payment is authorized but not yet charged
infoList.staffReview: Staff will review your order shortly (usually within 24 hours)
infoList.approved: If approved, payment will be processed and tickets sent to your email
infoList.rejected: If rejected, the authorization will be cancelled and funds returned
infoList.emailUpdates: You'll receive email updates about your order status

success.confirmedDescription: Your payment was processed successfully. Your tickets are on the way.
success.ticketsSentBody: We've emailed your tickets with the QR code. Check your inbox (and the spam folder, just in case).

cancel.title: Payment Cancelled
cancel.description: Your payment was cancelled. No charges were made to your account.
cancel.formDataSaved: Your form data has been saved
cancel.tryWhenReady: You can try again when you're ready

postPayment.ticketsSentEmail: Your tickets have been sent to your email. You can view and download them below.
postPayment.noTicketsFound: No tickets found for this order.
postPayment.ticketsSentToEmail: Your tickets have been sent to your email address
postPayment.presentQRCode: Present your QR code at the venue entrance
postPayment.singleUseOnly: Each ticket can only be used once
postPayment.pleaseWait: Please wait while we retrieve your order...

error.orderNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find any order information. The link may be invalid or has expired.
